one_line_summary: Exemplary implementation: ADR-first, atomic Lua, both algorithms+backends, full adversarial pass, strong property/concurrency tests.
strengths: Atomic Lua scripts with server-side TIME eliminate lost updates and clock skew
Thorough ADR with honest tradeoffs and 4 rejected alternatives
Comprehensive tests: threads, asyncio, fakeredis, hypothesis, adversarial
weaknesses: Backend Protocol is algorithm-aware (token_bucket/sliding_window methods) which limits extensibility
InMemoryBackend mixes monotonic clock with wall-clock for reset_ts
Property test relaxes bound to 2*capacity rather than asserting a tighter invariant
